positive: Stylized minimalist forest scene with geometric abstract elements. A central composition featuring stylized outlines of towering deciduous trees, gentle rolling hills, and whimsical deer silhouettes interacting with floating orbs of light. The style should be a sophisticated blend of Art Nouveau and modern vector illustration, using strong black linework against a deep, ethereal cyan and muted sage green background. Focus on clean, graphic silhouettes and repeating natural patterns. High contrast, excellent negative space, ideal for screen printing on apparel. Crisp lines, perfect symmetry.
